message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="steve-schoger" color="pink" summary="Confirm CSS is fully committed per team lead request">
Lea, the team lead has asked that the modified `main.css` be committed. It looks like the latest token adjustments and skip link styling were already committed in `028bba1` -- the working tree is clean now. Can you confirm that commit includes all your changes? If there's anything outstanding, please commit it immediately.

The lesson from the reset: commit after every green. No uncommitted work sitting in the working tree.
</teammate-message>

input.content:
Confirmed: `static/css/main.css` has zero uncommitted changes. Working tree is clean. All my CSS work is committed and pushed across these commits:

- `a2da079` - Checkmark indicator for custom checkbox
- `22662be` - Generic `aria-invalid` base rule
- `7979586` - `--color-success` contrast comment + site-header/button-text components
- `dd038a1` - Skip link `:focus-visible`
- `6c757bc` - Registration template a11y fixes

Nothing outstanding. Following commit discipline.
